span.p:
Wall Socket / Plug Pack
240 V AC: L / N / PE

span.p:
RS PRO 0466283 Isolator
3P 40 A IP65 (use 2 poles)
L IN / L OUT, N IN / N OUT

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Schneider Acti9 A9D11806 RCBO
6 A, Curve C, 1P+N
30 mA Type A

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Roxburgh DRF06 EMC Filter
6 A, 250 V AC, DIN rail
IN: L/N OUT: L/N
Earth stud -> PE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Schneider LC1D09BD Main Contacts
Power poles (L & N pass-through)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
A6-400EC Servo Drive
AC Input Terminals
L1 / L2 / PE

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
RS PRO 1368321 PSU
240 VAC -> 24 VDC 10 A
Outputs: +24 / 0V / PE

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
E-STOP Pushbutton
Use NC contact
(in series with contactor coil)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LC1D09BD Coil Terminals
A1 (+) / A2 (-)
24 VDC coil

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CN1 Connector (DB-15/DA-15)
Pins used here:
Pin 5 = DO3+ (Brake)
Pin 4 = DO3- (Brake)
Pin 15 = +24V internal (200 mA max) (NOT used for brake power)
Pin 14 = COM- (internal 0V ref)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Finder 95.05 Socket (DIN)
Coil: A1 / A2
Contacts Pole1: 11(COM) 12(NC) 14(NO)
Contacts Pole2: 21(COM) 22(NC) 24(NO)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Finder 40.52.9.024.0000 Relay
24 VDC coil, DPDT, 8 A contacts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Finder 99.02 LED/Diode Module
(Across A1/A2) - coil polarity matters
A1 must be +, A2 must be -

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Motor Brake Coil
Leads: BK+ / BK-
Brake RELEASES when 24 V applied

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Flyback Diode across brake coil
1N4007 (typ.)
Stripe (cathode) -> BK+
Non-stripe (anode) -> BK-

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
nVent Eriflex 563720 used as PE bar
Bond to mains PE
